articles.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: AIADMK’s Leemarose, one of richest candidates, declares assets worth ₹1,049 crore
articles.description: Wife of lottery baron S. Martin, Ms. Leemarose was appointed joint secretary of the women’s wing of the AIADMK after she joined the Dravidian party on quitting the Indiya Jananayaga Katchi (IJK) a few months ago.

articles.title: Hermeus raises $350M to build autonomous hypersonic fighters
articles.description: The defense aviation startup is coming off two successful flight demonstrations, and with the next one, it's aiming to go supersonic.

Muthoot Finance To Consider Interim Dividend On April 10, Check Record Date
articles.description: Shareholders are classified as those whose names appear as on the close of business hours on April 13, 2026 as beneficial owners.

topStories.title: IRGC warns neighbouring countries: 'Restraint is over'; says will target US, allies' infrastructure
topStories.description: As US President Donald Trump's deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz looms, Tehran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) on Tuesday (local time) issued a warning to the neighbouring countries. The IRGC said that ‘restraint is over’

dailyNews.description: US rapper Kanye West has offered to meet members of the UK Jewish community during his upcoming visit in July, when he will be headlining the Wireless Festival. This comes after a controversy erupted following a series of his antisemitic remarks

dailyNews.description: Iran's reported 14 million volunteers is more than previously noted by state media. Trump warned of drastic consequences if Iran doesn't end its oil blockade. Amidst this, Iran has turned down a ceasefire offer, advocating for a permanent resolution.

dailyNews.title: US-Israeli strikes destroy buildings in northern Iran
dailyNews.description: Video shows widespread destruction in Pardis, northern Iran. The Israeli military said they bombed Iran on April 7.

dailyNews.title: USA striker Patrick Agyemang’s World Cup in doubt after stretcher exit
dailyNews.description: Agyemang looked emotional as he was stretchered off after an awkward fall during an English Championship game.

dailyNews.title: Mets make amends with team legend who was involved in Astros' sign-stealing scandal
dailyNews.description: The New York Mets announced they will retire Hall of Fame electee Carlos Beltran's No. 15, honoring one of the greatest players in franchise history at Citi Field.

dailyNews.title: 'Unsupervised' child at HersheyPark zoo injured by wolf after crawling under safety barrier
dailyNews.description: An "unsupervised" child was injured by a wolf at Hersheypark's ZooAmerica, and now the parents are charged with misdemeanor child endangerment by police.

dailyNews.title: World Series champion Tom Nieto dead at 65
dailyNews.description: Former MLB catcher and coach Tom Nieto, who won the 1987 World Series with the Minnesota Twins, died at 65 after a heart attack, his sister says.

dailyNews.title: Former Virginia Gov Glenn Youngkin hints at political future, says he's 'chomping at the bit' after exit
dailyNews.description: Ex-Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin says he still has "more to give," suggesting his political career may continue after his gubernatorial term ended.

dailyNews.title: Ilhan Omar calls Trump an 'unhinged lunatic,' urges booting him out of office
dailyNews.description: Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar of Minnesota referred to President Donald Trump as an "unhinged lunatic" and called for him to be booted from office.

dailyNews.title: Trump's threatens to destroy "whole civilization" as Iran deadline looms
dailyNews.description: Iran's regime calls on youth to form human shields around power plants as Trump's deadline nears and he warns "a whole civilization will die tonight."

dailyNews.title: Trump warns of "critical period" in Iran war as deadline to avoid escalation looms
dailyNews.description: President Trump's deadline for Iran to reach a deal to end the war or face punishing strikes on its bridges and power plants is less than 24 hours away.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Artemis II astronauts "modern-day pioneers" in live conversation
dailyNews.description: President Trump praised the crew of NASA's Artemis II mission in a brief chat late Monday, saying they had "inspired the entire world" after they looped around the moon in a record-breaking voyage.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Trump calls Artemis II crew, congratulates them on historic trip around moon
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke with the crew of the Artemis II mission on Monday as they capped off a historic day that saw them loop around the far side of the moon and begin their return to Earth.

dailyNews.title: 4/6: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump sheds new light on mission to rescue F-16 crew members in Iran; Artemis II sets record for farthest distance travelled from Earth.

dailyNews.title: Decorated F-16 fighter pilot describes what went into mission to rescue U.S. airmen from Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is hailing the rescue of a downed weapons system officer as one of the most complex missions the U.S. military has ever attempted. Lt. Col. Dan Rooney, a decorated F-16 fighter pilot and combat veteran, joins CBS News to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Iran Proposal Isn’t Enough to Stop Attacks on Bridges and Power Plants
dailyNews.description: President Trump has told Iran it must open the Strait of Hormuz by 8 p.m. Tuesday or face the consequences, although he has delayed previous deadlines.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth Likens Easter Rescue of U.S. Airman to Resurrection of Jesus Christ
dailyNews.description: President Trump also asserted that God supports the American war against Iran “because God is good, and God wants to see people taken care of.”

dailyNews.title: Trump Threatens Jail if Journalists Protect Certain Iran Sources
dailyNews.description: The president indicated he would ask an unnamed media outlet to reveal the sources behind its coverage of Iran’s successful strike on a U.S. fighter jet, and of its crew.

dailyNews.title: Trump Threatens ‘Complete Demolition’ by Midnight, and Dark Money Flows Into Midterms
dailyNews.description: Plus, a look behind the moon.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II Astronauts Head Home After Historic Journey Around the Moon
dailyNews.description: The NASA lunar flyby took the four crew members farther from Earth than any humans. They witnessed a solar eclipse and received praise in a call from President Trump.
